metadata.title: Kuuzuki Breakout
metadata.author: Kuuzuki Game Engine
metadata.description: A classic Breakout game built with the Kuuzuki Game Engine - featuring pixel-perfect graphics, responsive controls, and addictive arcade gameplay.
controls: Left/Right Arrow Keys or A/D - Move paddle
features: Classic Breakout gameplay with modern polish
Multiple brick types with different point values
Progressive difficulty with increasing ball speed
Lives system with game over conditions
